title: stenotaphrum complanatum
intro: Stenotaphrum complanatum, also known as buffalo grass, is a perennial grass native to the southeastern United States and the Gulf Coast. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve wound healing. Stenotaphrum complanatum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
